title: M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering with specialization in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
content: The Master of Technology in CSE-AIML program for Working Professionals at the School of Computer Science & Engineering is specially designed to cater to the academic advancement of individuals already engaged in full-time employment in the technical or engineering sector. Recognized by regulatory bodies and aligned with UGC guidelines, the program enables working professionals to pursue a master degree without interrupting their current career paths. The program follows a weekend schedule (Saturday & Sunday) along with few evening classes, making it flexible and accessible. The Master of Technology in CSE-AIML at the School of Computer Science & Engineering is a two-year, full-time, postgraduate program designed to equip students with in-depth knowledge and practical expertise in the rapidly evolving domain of Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. This learner-centric, industry-oriented, and research-driven program challenges the intellect of students while providing a strong foundation in core computer science principles and specialized knowledge in AI/ML. The curriculum blends core courses, advanced electives, and a substantial dissertation or project, allowing students to gain hands-on experience and engage in cutting-edge research. It prepares postgraduates for diverse career paths—ranging from advanced industry roles in AI-driven technologies to research and innovation in academia or R&D labs. With focused exposure to areas such as deep learning, natural language processing, computer vision, data science, and intelligent systems, this program is an excellent choice for engineering graduates aiming to upskill and lead in the era of intelligent technologies. B.E/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks or equivalent in CGPA and Minimum of ONE Year Full time / Regular working Experience required Students having GATE/CUET Score will be given preference in merit 01 An ability to independently carry out research /investigation and development work to solve practical problems. 02 An ability to write and present a substantial technical report/document. 03 Students should be able to demonstrate a degree of mastery over the area as per the specialization of the program. The mastery should be at a level higher than the requirements in the appropriate bachelor program: 01 The Post Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall be able to successfully pursue doctoral research in Computer Science, Engineering and allied disciplines at institutions of transnational reputation. 02 The Post Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall serve in technical or managerial roles at Government firms, Corporates and contributing to the society as successful entrepreneurs through startup. 03 The Post Graduates of Computer Science and Engineering shall be engaged with leading Global Software Product development companies, Research & Consultancy organizations and academic Institutions. 01 Have the ability to work with emerging technologies in computing requisite to Industry 4.0. 02 Demonstrate Engineering Practice learned through industry internship and research project to solve live problems in various domains. B.E/B.Tech/MCA/M.Sc in relevant discipline with minimum 50% marks or equivalent in CGPA and Minimum of ONE Year Full time / Regular working Experience required Students having GATE/CUET Score will be given preference in merit
